dashboard.subtitleTaskforce: Here’s your performance summary—targets, streaks, and how you rank.
dashboard.subtitleDefault: Keep a clear read on performance, targets, and team energy.
dashboard.setTargetCta: Set a target on the <salesLog>Sales log</salesLog> to unlock progress here.
dashboard.loggedTodayContext: Logged today on your primary team context
dashboard.insightUp: Sales are up about {pct}% vs last week.
dashboard.insightDown: Sales dipped about {pct}% vs last week—still time to rebound.
dashboard.recentEmpty: Nothing yet—open Sales log to log a sale.
dashboard.progressCopy: You are at {pct}% of your active monthly goal. Keep logging on the Sales log.
dashboard.leaderboardSignIn: Sign in to see your weekly leaderboard.
dashboard.leaderboardEmptyRep: No sales logged this week yet—add one from Quick add or Sales log.
dashboard.leaderboardEmptyManager: No sales logged this week yet.
dashboard.salesAnalyticsDesc: Hidden by default—keep the home screen calm.
